name: LociGraph
description: AI-assisted claim extraction and knowledge graph app: Postgres/pgvector, Redis, FastAPI backend, worker, frontend, and Caddy.

migration.rollback: Run the acknowledged stopped-state rollback; preserve the named volumes, verified snapshots, and private override.
notes: The legacy source remains at /home/oreo/LociGraph pending canonical source migration.
A root-owned production override publishes only Caddy at 127.0.0.1:8090.
Backend, PostgreSQL, and Redis have no host-published ports; all six services use unless-stopped.

requirements: The production cutover created root-only offline named-volume snapshots and verified restore into temporary Docker volumes.
Generic dashboard backup execution remains disabled until scheduled retention and application-consistent PostgreSQL dumps are implemented.

notes: Handles JWT auth, an OpenAI API key, and an app login password as environment variables.
The production override binds only Caddy to 127.0.0.1:8090.
Backend, PostgreSQL, and Redis are internal-only with no host-published ports.
